scope: Bundle 7 outstanding pain fixes thành 1 task: (A) Lane network minimal viable infrastructure — Lane registry generator + workflow paths; (B) ACTIVITY_FEED generator + workflow paths; (C) LANE_ONBOARDING.md (1-page); (D) Fix 6 broken refs in T-L01 report from pending/ → approved/ + re-run aier_scan to verify 0 broken_refs; (E) build-artifacts.yml race-safe pull-rebase pattern; (F) check_deliverables.ps1 skip conditions for auto-* + backfill commits; (G) REPO_NOTIFICATIONS.md procedure doc for email spam mitigation.
